tasks.subject: SceneRuntimeState shared state object
tasks.description: MainScene의 mutable 필드를 SceneRuntimeState 인터페이스로 추출. MainScene이 소유하고 헬퍼에 참조 전달. 기존 this.field 접근을 state.field로 전환.

tasks.subject: VfxController extraction
tasks.description: impactEffects, shotTrails, movementEffects 풀 관리. spawn/update/trim 메서드 추출. ~300줄.

tasks.subject: StageGeometryManager extraction
tasks.description: applyStageGeometry, clearStageGeometry, addObstacle, addGate, addHazardZone, addCoverPointMarkers, handleAmmoPickup, handleHealthPickup, handleHazardZone, handleGateInteraction. ~400줄.

tasks.subject: DummyActorController extraction
tasks.description: updateDummyMovement, updateDummyBodyAngle, resolveHullAngle, rotateAngleTowards, stabilizeDummySteer, createDummyBlockedSteer, updateDummyCoverState, cover helpers. ~350줄.

tasks.subject: CombatController extraction
tasks.description: handleFire, handleReload, handleReloadInterrupt, spawnPlayerProjectiles, firePlayerBeam, callPlayerAirStrike, updateAirStrikes, handleDummyFire, updateBullets, handleWeaponSwitch. ~500줄.

tasks.subject: TODO(bug) hotfixes
tasks.description: 1) CameraFeedbackLogic:130 미지원 kind에 EMPTY_RESULT 폴백. 2) SettingsStorage:51 save() try/catch. 3) 탄환 충돌 카메라 셰이크 강도 과도 — 이펙트 파라미터 튜닝 완료.

tasks.subject: Verification gates and execution report
tasks.description: type-check, lint, 206+ tests, build, 14+ E2E 전부 pass 확인. MainScene ~800줄 이하 확인. execution report 갱신.
